items.explanation: 371 − 96 = 179. Read the question carefully, rule out answers that do not fit the facts, and choose the option that matches what you worked out.

items.stem: Q33. which representation best shows place value?

options.label: B
options.text: A table showing thousands, hundreds, tens and ones for 258
